scores.correctness_notes: The agent provides Python API code using v2 (`charms.traefik_k8s.v2.ingress`) while the gold standard says the recommended library is v1 (`charms.traefik_k8s.v1.ingress`). The gold standard also focuses on the data schema (application-data with name/model/port, unit-data with host) rather than Python API, explicitly noting charmlibs docs cover interface specs not library API. The agent's answer addresses the spirit of the question but diverges from the gold standard's content.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several unverified items: `on.ready` and `on.revoked` event names, `self._ingress.url` attribute, `strip_prefix=True` and `scheme='https'` constructor parameters, `IngressPerUnitRequirer` class. The gold standard only confirms `IngressPerAppRequirer` exists. Using v2 when gold standard documents v1 is a factual discrepancy. These details may exist in the traefik-k8s-operator repo but cannot be verified against the gold standard.
